title: Travala Lets AI Agents Book Hotels with USDC on Base
summary: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.
body:
Travala, a blockchain-based travel platform, has launched a new protocol that allows AI agents to search and book hotels using USDC, a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar, on the Base blockchain. This innovation streamlines the booking process by leveraging AI to handle the initial search and reservation steps.

The protocol ensures that travelers retain ultimate control by requiring their approval for the final payment. This means that while AI agents can handle the logistics of finding and booking accommodations, the traveler must confirm the transaction before it is completed. This approach aims to balance convenience with user autonomy.

This development is significant for everyday travelers who are interested in using cryptocurrencies for their bookings. By integrating USDC on the Base blockchain, Travala offers a more efficient and potentially cost-effective way to book hotels. The use of AI agents can also save time and reduce the hassle of manually searching for accommodations.

Travelers interested in this feature should keep an eye on Travala's updates and ensure they have a compatible wallet for USDC transactions on the Base blockchain. As the adoption of cryptocurrencies in travel continues to grow, this could be a game-changer for those looking to streamline their booking processes.

Travala's new protocol lets AI handle the search and booking, but you keep control over payments. A smart way to blend convenience and security.
